creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Thanks, please commit it.

On Thu, Oct 12, 2006 at 07:30:59AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of benchmarks/sysbench,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/104326 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104326
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
